jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - MRF - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Manufacturing Engineer looking for your next big career move? MRF in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About MRF:
MRF is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MRF!
